title: Chapter 8 - The CSS Box Model Explained
description: Quick concept check for the CSS box model.

questions.prompt: Which order is correct from inside to outside?

explanations.overview: The order is content, padding, border, margin.

byOptionId.a: Correct. The order is content, padding, border, margin.
byOptionId.b: Not quite. The order is content, padding, border, margin.
byOptionId.c: Not quite. The order is content, padding, border, margin.
byOptionId.d: Not quite. The order is content, padding, border, margin.

questions.prompt: What is the main difference between margin and padding?

options.label: Padding is outside and margin is inside
Padding is inside, margin is outside

explanations.overview: Padding is inside the border. Margin is outside the border.

byOptionId.a: Not quite. Padding is inside the border. Margin is outside the border.
byOptionId.b: Not quite. Padding is inside the border. Margin is outside the border.
byOptionId.c: Correct. Padding is inside the border. Margin is outside the border.
byOptionId.d: Not quite. Padding is inside the border. Margin is outside the border.
